aries.overall: This week favors bold starts and clean follow-through.
aries.love: Be clear about what you want; it reduces friction.
aries.career: Momentum builds after one decisive conversation.
aries.health: Channel extra energy into structured movement.
aries.tip: Start before you feel fully ready.

taurus.career: Progress comes from refining what already works.
taurus.tip: Improve the system, not the stress.

gemini.career: A quick follow-up unlocks stalled progress.

cancer.overall: Emotional clarity helps you choose wisely this week.
cancer.career: Protect your bandwidth; focus improves outcomes.
cancer.tip: Choose what feels calm and true.
